secondchanceforge.config.coyoteTimeEnabl:
Determines if the 'Coyote Time' feature is enabled.
 'Coyote Time' allows the player to jump for a second or two after falling off of a block in order to stop themselves from falling into a pit.
 This will not allow the player to double jump, only jump when walking off of a block.
secondchanceforge.config.coyoteTimeTicks: Determines how long (in ticks) the player has to jump with 'Coyote Time' after falling off a block.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceAct: Determines how much health the player must start with for 'Second Chance' to activate.
Determines what percent of health the player must start with for 'Second Chance' to activate.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceAnv: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by falling anvils.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceArr: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by arrows.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceEly: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by crashing into a wall.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceEna:
Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature is enabled.
 'Second Chance' leaves the player at half a heart after taking fatal damage from a mob or explosion while at or above 7 hearts.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceExp: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by explosions.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceFal: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by falling blocks.
Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by fall damage.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceFir: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by fireworks.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceHea: Determines how much health the player should be left with after 'Second Chance' activates.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceLig: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by lightning.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceMag: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by magic, such as potions.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceMob: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by mobs.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChancePla: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by players.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceRem: Determines what percent of health the player should be left with after 'Second Chance' activates.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceSou: Determines if the 'Second Chance' sound will play when the effect is activated.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceSta: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by a falling stalactite.
Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by falling on a stalagmite.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceTri: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by thrown tridents.
secondchanceforge.config.secondChanceWit: Determines if the 'Second Chance' feature will be activated by Wither skulls.
secondchanceforge.config.usePercentConfi: Determines if the 'percentage of health' config values will be used instead of exact values.
secondchanceforge.configuration.title: Config
